title: DENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental care services including cleanings, sealings, fillings, extractions, root canals, crowns/bridges/dentures, oral cancer screenings, and referrals to other dentists as needed. 330 Chiloquin Boulevard Chiloquin, OR 97624 Eligibility: Native American individuals of federally recognized tribes Hours: Walk-in hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-10:30am and 1pm-2:30pm Office hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm (541) 882-1487 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-1487 Alternate (541) 783-3295 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare, and provide insurance. Also offers sliding scale fees. DOCUMENTS: Tribal card or certification from a federally recognized tribe, birth certificate/photo identification such as state issued ID or a driver's license, social security card, insurance cards. Proof of income will be required for those without insurance. Klamath Tribal members or children of Klamath Tribal members residing in Kalmath County must provide a current utility bill or rental receipt with rental contract in order to show residency. AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Services: Dental Care Referrals * Native American Community Dental Hygiene * Native American Community Dental Prosthodontics * Native American Community Endodontics * Native American Community Periodontics * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - MEDICAL AND PHARMACY CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER
